analysis: The project is a web-based interactive presentation about black holes. The theme should emphasize cosmic, dark, and animated visuals. The current files suggest a need for enhanced animations, dark cosmic themes, and interactive elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with dark cosmic themes, including black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the design is visually immersive and aligns with the black hole topic.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Include sections for interactive black hole visuals and animated slides.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and implement JavaScript functionality for animations, interactive elements, and smooth transitions related to black holes.
